title: Alumni Transformational Journey: Experience Sharing Webinar
text: "Alumni Transformational Journey: A Conversation Led by Experience" online event Event Status: Completed Date & Time: August 07, 2025 7:00 PM IST Recommended for: Offer holders and potential applicants Book now Join us for an inspiring webinar as two University of Southampton alumni share how their time at Southampton transformed their lives — from shaping global careers to building lasting perspectives. Don’t miss this chance to gain real-world insights from those who’ve been there and done that! The webinar is scheduled for Thursday, 07 August 2025 from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM (IST).
summary: This completed online webinar featured two University of Southampton alumni sharing how their experiences transformed their lives and careers. It offered real-world insights to offer holders and applicants.
entities: Alumni Transformational Journey: A Conversation Led by Experience
